title: phelypaea mutelii
intro: Phelypaea mutelii, also known as the Purple Phlox or Mutel's Catchfly, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polemoniaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Phelypaea mutelii include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
